arts.ttl: 3 Canada Players to Watch in the Concacaf Gold Cup Quarterfinal vs. Guatemala
arts.sum: No player at the Concacaf Gold Cup had a more significant time between group play and the knockout phase than central midfielder Nathan Saliba . Saliba scored in Canada’s first two games of the tournament, a 6–0 win over Honduras and a 1–1 draw with Curaçao, and has been one of Marsch’s most dynamic midfield options, in what has become a competitive position.

arts.ttl: Canada vs. Guatemala: Gold Cup Quarterfinal Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: After winning the group stage for the first time since 2009, Canada enters the knockout round with all eyes on the trophy, but also not looking past the matchup with No. 106-ranked Guatemala. The expectations are high for the Canadian men’s national team heading into the Concacaf Gold Cup quarterfinal against Guatemala on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Guatemala vs Canada - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's CONCACAF Gold Cup clash between Guatemala and Canada, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
